semantic.role: Definitions of architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine mirror system, specifying policy constraints on code structure and dependencies.
responsibilities: Import dependency enforcement between architectural layers
Prevention of direct access to low-level database adapters from service and intermediate layers
Pattern-based file inclusion/exclusion for rule applicability
Severity and enforceability control for rule violations
Documentation of rule rationale and remediation guidance
invariants: Rule severity must be 'error' when enforceable is true
The 'appliesTo' patterns must exclude the database layer itself (e.g., '!src/db/**') to avoid self-conflict
Every rule must have a non-empty 'ruleId' and 'title'
The 'bodyMarkdown' field must contain actionable allowed/not-allowed examples

English.role: Defines an import restriction rule for the ArchSpine mirror system that prohibits non-database layers from directly importing database adapter modules.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Version of the rule schema to ensure compatibility with the rule engine
parameter_definitions.ruleId: Unique identifier for the rule, used for reference in reports and fixes
parameter_definitions.title: Human-readable short name of the rule, displayed in violation messages
parameter_definitions.summary: Concise explanation of what the rule enforces, used for quick understanding
parameter_definitions.appliesTo: Glob patterns specifying which source files are subject to the rule; supports inclusion and exclusion via '!' prefix
parameter_definitions.severity: Error level of violations: 'error' blocks pipelines, 'warning' notifies without blocking, 'info' provides informational feedback
parameter_definitions.enforceable: Boolean flag indicating whether the rule can be automatically enforced or is advisory only
parameter_definitions.rationale: Business or technical justification for the rule, aids developers in understanding why it exists
parameter_definitions.bodyMarkdown: Full markdown documentation of the rule, including examples of allowed and disallowed code patterns

English.stability_and_risks: This rule directly impacts system stability by enforcing layer isolation, preventing tight coupling between business logic and storage implementations. If misconfigured (e.g., incorrect 'appliesTo' patterns or severity set too low), critical dependency violations may go undetected, leading to architectural erosion. The enforceable flag ensures automated checks in CI/CD pipelines; disabling it increases risk of regressions. The rule's rationale and bodyMarkdown provide necessary context for developers to self-correct, reducing false-positive frustration. Overall, proper configuration maintains long-term system maintainability and reduces technical debt.

Simplified Chinese.role: 为 ArchSpine 镜像系统定义导入限制规则，禁止非数据库层直接导入数据库适配器模块。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 规则结构的版本号，用于确保与规则引擎的兼容性
parameter_definitions.ruleId: 规则的唯一标识符，供报告和修复功能引用
parameter_definitions.title: 规则的可读短名称，显示在违规消息中
parameter_definitions.summary: 规则的简要说明，帮助快速理解规则所强制的内容
parameter_definitions.appliesTo: Glob 模式，指定哪些源文件受规则约束；支持包含和排除（通过 '!' 前缀）
parameter_definitions.severity: 违规的严重级别：'error' 会阻塞流水线，'warning' 仅通知但不阻塞，'info' 提供信息性反馈
parameter_definitions.enforceable: 布尔标志，指示规则是否可自动执行，或仅为建议性
parameter_definitions.rationale: 规则的业务或技术理由，帮助开发者理解规则存在的原因
parameter_definitions.bodyMarkdown: 规则的完整 Markdown 文档，包含允许和禁止的代码模式示例

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 该规则通过强制层隔离，直接影响到系统稳定性，防止业务逻辑与存储实现之间的紧密耦合。如果配置不当（例如 'appliesTo' 模式错误或严重级别过低），关键依赖违规可能被遗漏，导致架构腐化。enforceable 标志确保在 CI/CD 流水线中进行自动检查；禁用该标志会增加回归风险。规则的 rationale 和 bodyMarkdown 为开发者提供了必要的上下文以自行修正，减少误报带来的挫败感。总体而言，正确配置有助于长期维护系统的可维护性并减少技术债务。
